meta.name: Eternal Wind (FF3 Onion Knights)
meta.source: Inspired by Final Fantasy III: Onion Knights, Crystal Tower, and floating continent skies
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color tokens still live only in styles.css and are intentionally omitted here: --radius, --radius-s, --shadow. To push the FF3 identity further, add subtle sky-gradient panel fills and a faint wind-glow around interactive accents when non-color tokens are supported.

bg.desc: Night sky over the floating continent

bg-soft.desc: Header elevation with a cool dawn-blue cast

panel.desc: Primary menu panel inspired by Crystal Tower stone-blue

panel-2.desc: Raised surface for menus and controls

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation surface with brighter sky tint

text.desc: Primary text with clean moonlit contrast

accent.desc: Eternal Wind cyan for primary interactive emphasis

accent-dk.desc: Deeper sky-blue for active and pressed states

gold.desc: Warm relic-gold for highlights and section titles

crystal-earth.desc: Earth Crystal analog - vibrant growth green

crystal-fire.desc: Fire Crystal analog - bright ember orange

done.desc: Completed state aligned with earth crystal green

done-dk.desc: Darker done shade for depth and gradients
